ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., ticker symbol) */,
  "buy_price" REAL /* Current buy price of the stock */,
  "ten_yr_low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock over the last 10 years */,
  "ten_yr_high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock over the last 10 years */,
  "ten_yr_prob" INTEGER /* Probability of the stock price moving over the next 10 years */,
  "cagr_returns" REAL /* Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., software, banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist entry was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price rise, price drop) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold to trigger the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., fundamental analysis, technical analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the platform accessed (e.g., stocks, watchlists) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
